name: Orbit Rerun Squad Execution
description: Run an approved Orbit rerun lane through a real multiagent execution loop with explicit session routing, isolated evidence, and separate review ownership.

notes: Do not let Samwise perform substantive implementation before the implementation session route is active.
Planned roles do not count as actual participants; every claimed role needs participant evidence.
Use explicit attempt-specific artifact paths for product acceptance, interaction review, validation closeout, red-pen evidence, and retrospective closeout.
If the worktree path is outside the primary repository root, warn AJ that environment approval prompts may occur for bootstrap, build, and test commands.
Do not claim a successful multiagent rerun unless implementation, product review, interaction review, and validation review were all routed through distinct session-backed passes.
Use the exact lane branch provided by the intent; do not infer the active attempt from thread memory or the latest historical note.
Do not promote success claims, process changes, or branch promotion without AJ review.
